side_effects.description: hives on legs, thighs, and ass from Blue Sky Peptides CJC/IPAM. Same reaction occurred upon re-exposure with Blue Sky. No reactions from other companies or current use of Peptide Science brand.

protocol_notes: Medical professional. Used Blue Sky Peptides ~7 years ago with reaction. Tried other companies without issues. Returned to Blue Sky to verify and reaction recurred. Attributes to Blue Sky preservatives/fillers. Currently using Peptide Science brand without reaction. Recommends 3-6 months off and switching companies.
